_comment: Supertrend bot. Edit freely: any symbols, any bar_size, any ST(atr_period, multiplier). Example below = long_only ST(10,3) on 15-min bars, SWING mode (holds overnight, GTC stop), paper account DU672616 on IB Gateway port 4002.
_direction_options: long_only = long when bullish, cash when bearish, never short (e.g. buy & hold SOXL, sell when bearish, re-buy when bullish). short_only = short when bearish, cash when bullish, never long. long_short = always in the market: long when bullish, flip to short when bearish.
_strategies_comment: strategies has TWO sections. 'stocks' = equities on SMART (existing config, unchanged). 'futures' = CME/GLOBEX futures (e.g. MNQ, MES): set sec_type=FUT (added automatically) and exchange; specifying just the root symbol (MNQ) auto-selects the CLOSEST/front-month expiry at connect time. Futures trade their native ~24h session (no OVERNIGHT venue) with NATIVE stops, and size by contract multiplier (MNQ x$2, MES x$5) — prefer fixed_stocks (= number of contracts).
_dema_filter_comment: DEMA trend filter. enabled=true => longs only when close > DEMA(period) (and shorts only when close < DEMA(period)), evaluated on the last completed bar. This is the core entry gate: buy only when Supertrend is bullish AND price is above DEMA(200). hist_duration must provide enough bars for the period (allow ~2x warmup, so >=30 D for DEMA(200) on 15-min RTH bars).
_adx_filter_comment: Optional ADX trend-STRENGTH filter. enabled=true => only open a position when ADX(period) >= threshold on the last completed bar (market is trending strongly enough), IN ADDITION TO the Supertrend signal and the DEMA filter. Set per-strategy or here for all. Shorthand: "adx": 20 == { enabled:true, period:14, threshold:20 }. Disabled by default here.
_rsi_filter_comment: Optional RSI MOMENTUM filter. enabled=true => a LONG is only opened when RSI(period) > long_min and a SHORT only when RSI(period) < short_max, on the last completed bar (momentum must agree with the Supertrend direction). Filters out the low-conviction flips that whipsaw the raw Supertrend. Backtests (MNQ/MES 30m & 1h, long_short) show RSI>50/<50 lifts win rate ~6-10pts, cuts drawdown, and improves net P/L in both choppy and trending windows. Shorthand: "rsi": 50 == { enabled:true, period:14, long_min:50, short_max:50 }. Disabled by default; enable to use.
_macd_filter_comment: Optional MACD MOMENTUM filter. enabled=true => a LONG is only opened when the MACD histogram > 0 (macd line above signal) and a SHORT only when histogram < 0, on the last completed bar (momentum must agree with the Supertrend direction). Best paired with the RSI filter on 30m/1h. Disabled by default.
_regime_filter_comment: REGIME-ADAPTIVE gate (Choppiness Index + ADX). Classifies the tape TREND vs CHOP with hysteresis and adapts entries: a trend-follower earns its edge in trends and bleeds in chop. When enabled it SUPERSEDES the always-on rsi/macd gates (applies momentum by regime instead). Flip to TREND when CHOP<chop_trend AND ADX>adx_trend; flip to CHOP when CHOP>chop_range; else hold. TREND: enter on Supertrend (require rsi+macd only if trend_momentum=true). CHOP: chop_action 'stand_aside' (take NO new entries, only manage/exit) or 'momentum' (require rsi+macd to enter). Backtests (MNQ/MES full multi-regime history) favour 'stand_aside': ~halves drawdown and beats always-on rsi+macd in 5/6 series. Needs hist_duration large enough for DEMA/ADX/CHOP warmup. Disabled by default.
_partial_tp_comment: PARTIAL TAKE-PROFIT (scale-out). R = |entry - initial stop|. Each tranche books fraction of the position with a marketable exit when price reaches entry +/- r_multiple*R. After the first trim at >= tighten_after_r, the runner switches from the Supertrend trail to a trail_r-R trailing stop (locks profit) and still exits on a Supertrend flip. Needs fixed_stocks >= 2 (half of 1 = 0 -> no-op). Backtests: trim 50% at 2R + trail rest 1R beats plain exit; laddering into smaller/earlier 1R trims does NOT help. Best schemes: 50%@2R (default) or 33%@2R + 33%@3R + 34% runner. Example alt ladder: "tranches": [{"fraction":0.3333,"r_multiple":2},{"fraction":0.3333,"r_multiple":3}]. Disabled by default.
_entry_window_comment: Omitted on purpose -> each strategy's entry_window defaults to its market_hours session (RTH 09:35-15:55, ETH 04:00-20:00, 24H 00:00-23:59). Set entry_window here or per-strategy to override.
_order_type_comment: RTH strategies enter with MARKET + stop-market. ETH/24H strategies enter with a marketable-LIMIT that chases (market orders are rejected outside RTH) + a stop-LIMIT protective stop, and exit with an aggressively marketable limit.
